# STARTER_DASHBOARD_AUDIT

Use this starter for **Dashboard Audit**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/runtime/route_cards/rt_dashboard_audit.md`
- `dist/runtime/contracts_lite/dashboard_audit.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/dashboard-data-expert.md`
- `dist/runtime/skills/ui-system-expert.md`
- optional: `dist/runtime/skills/accessibility-feedback-expert.md`
- optional: `dist/runtime/skills/color-system-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use for KPI hierarchy and chart-logic evaluation, not generic screen cleanup.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1890 words / ~2514 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_UI.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Dashboard Audit. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
